node.statement: STEP: In the protected phase (H_2 < 1-r), the dominant config is all-s. Corrections come from: (i) bulk e-domains ∝ N·L(t)^{-2} = N·e^{-2t/τ}·L_0^{-2}, and (ii) boundary e-domains ∝ L(t)^{-1} = e^{-t/τ}·L_0^{-1}. When L(t)^2 << N (early time), bulk domains dominate: |δI_c| ∝ Ne^{-2t/τ}. When L(t)^2 >> N (late time), boundary domains dominate: |δI_c| ∝ e^{-t/τ}.
